description.value: The creature's attacks carry a deadly poison or toxin. Whenever the creature successfully deals damage to a target in melee, the target must make a Toughness test with a penalty of –10 times X or suffer 1d10 additional damage (ignoring armour and Toughness bonus). X represents the Toxic rating.

system.benefit: After dealing melee damage, the target must pass a Toughness test at –10 x X or suffer 1d10 additional damage (ignoring armour and Toughness bonus). X is the Toxic rating.
